name: Binding::CreateCallContext
title: Binding::CreateCallContext
syntax: long Binding::CreateCallContext(distObjMethodRef * member, int64 requestID, callContext <Prototype>& cco);
description: Creates a new call context with the given method member prototype and request ID.
The function prototype of the call context must match the function prototype of the method member.

parameters.name: member
parameters.description: Method member which provides the function prototype and call context side.

parameters.name: cco
parameters.description: Out-parameter for the new call context.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
